who: law firms processing 5–15 client intake forms/month
offer: For law firms processing 5–15 client intake forms/month, manual data entry causes delays in court submissions. We prepare documents instead of manual data entry.
problem: Manual conversion of client intake forms into case files is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firm solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM law firms with a demo video
Join community forums for law firm tools
try_it: Let users try template-based document generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
